title: ImplOutput
description: Structured return from a Stage 9.2 domain specialist (rust-developer, golang-developer, frontend-developer, backend-developer, ios-developer, android-developer, macos-app-developer, windows-app-developer, or dev-executor).

files_modified.description: Absolute paths to source files created or modified in this phase (NOT tests — those are in TddOutput.test_files).

all_tests_green.description: True iff every test the tdd-guide wrote now passes against the implementation. False means specialist gave up before GREEN; qa-agent will surface the failures.

build_command.description: Exact command that builds and tests the project (e.g. 'cargo test --workspace', 'pnpm test').
